creator: nvass@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 238322
Patch

When using the -U "username" it's sometimes useful to be able to exclude the username from the processes' list. This is done using -x.

The same is true for the interactive command "u" and this done using the interactive command "x".

top -U root -x
or in interactive mode:

Phabricator link:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D37501
